name: Trinity Force
description:
[EQUIP Body] (Body: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I hold, score 1 point. +2 Might

name: Spinning Axe
description:
[QUICK-DRAW] (This has REACTION. When you play it, attach it to a unit you control.)
[EQUIP 1 Rune] (1 Rune: Attach this to a unit you control.)
TEMPORARY (If this is unattached, kill it at the start of its controller's Beginning Phase, before scoring.)
flavorText:
"Got axes, need victims."
—Draven

name: Blade of the Ruined King
description:
[EQUIP] — Order, Kill a friendly unit (Pay the cost: Attach this to a unit you control.)
+4 Might
flavorText:
"You are not the hero of this tale."
—Viego

name: Svellsongur
description:
[EQUIP1, Calm] (1, Calm: Attach this to a unit you control.)
As this is attached to a unit, copy that unit's text to this Equipment's effect text for as long as this is attached to it.
Might +0
flavorText: "Only the greatest Freljord heroes have weapons made of True Ice!" — Nunu

name: Sterak's Gage
description:
[QUICK-DRAW] (This has REACTION. When you play it, attach it to a unit you control.)
[EQUIP Calm] (Calm: Attach this to a unit you control.)
Might +3
flavorText: Claws for concern.

name: Guardian Angel
description:
[EQUIP Calm] (Calm: Attach this to a unit you control.)
If I would die, kill Guardian Angel instead. Heal me, Exhaust me, and recall me.
Might +1

name: Long Sword
description:
[QUICK-DRAW] (This has REACTION. When you play it, attach it to a unit you control.) [EQUIP Fury] (Fury: Attach this to a unit you control.)
Might +2
flavorText: Efforts to create the Longer Sword quickly ran into diminishing returns.

name: Doran's Shield
description:
[EQUIP Calm] (Calm: Attach this to a unit you control.)
TANK (I must be assigned combat damage first.) +1 Might

name: Sivir - Battle Mistress
description:
When you recycle a rune, you may exhaust me to play a Gold gear token exhausted.
When one or more enemy units die, ready me.

name: Renata Glasc - Chem-Baroness
description:
When you or an ally hold, you may exhaust me to play a Gold gear token exhausted.
While your score is within 3 points of the Victory Score, your Gold ADD an additional 1.

name: Azir - Emperor of the Sands
description:
Your Sand Soldiers have [WEAPONMASTER].
1, Exhaust: Play a 2 Might Sand Soldier unit token to your base. Use only if you've played an Equipment this turn.

name: Irelia - Blade Dancer
description:
When you choose a friendly unit, you may exhaust me and pay 1 Rune to ready it.
When you conquer, you may pay 1 to ready me.

name: Draven - Glorious Executioner
description: When you win a combat, draw 1. (You win if only your units remain after combat.)

name: Overzealous Fan
description: When I defend, you may kill me to move an attacking unit to its base.
flavorText: "Like Draven says... Hit 'em where it hurts!"

name: Lucian - Merciless
description:
[WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [Equip] one of your Equipment to me for 1 Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
The first time I conquer each turn, ready me.
flavorText: <em>"One of us finds peace. One of us walks away."</e>

name: Draven - Vanquisher
description:
When I win a combat, play a Gold gear token exhausted.
When I attack or defend, you may pay Fury. If you do, give me +2 Might this turn.
flavorText: "Man, I'm good."

name: Feral Strength
description:
REACTION (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[REPEAT 2] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give a unit +2 Might this turn.

name: Ahri - Inquisitive (Overnumbered)
description: When I attack or defend, give an enemy unit here -2 Might this turn, to a minimum of 1 Might.
flavorText: "Just remember...to follow the fox."

name: Irelia - Blade Dancer (Overnumbered)
description:
When you choose a friendly unit, you may exhaust me and pay 1 Rune to ready it.
When you conquer, you may pay 1 to ready me.

name: Renata Glasc - Chem-Baroness (Overnumbered)
description:
When you or an ally hold, you may exhaust me to play a Gold gear token exhausted.
While your score is within 3 points of the Victory Score, your Gold [ADD] an additional 1.

name: Draven - Vanquisher (Alternate Art)
description:
When I win a combat, play a Gold gear token exhausted.
When I attack or defend, you may pay Fury. If you do, give me +2 Might this turn.
flavorText: "Man, I'm good."

name: Irelia - Fervent
description:
DEFLECT (Opponents must pay Rune to choose me with a spell or ability)
When you choose or ready me, give me +1 Might this turn.
flavorText: "Do we want to be safe, or free? The choice is ours."

name: Irelia - Fervent (Alternate Art)
description:
DEFLECT (Opponents must pay Rune to choose me with a spell or ability)
When you choose or ready me, give me +1 Might this turn.
flavorText: "Do we want to be safe, or free? The choice is ours."

name: Doran's Blade
description:
[EQUIP Body] (Body: Attach this to a unit you control.)
+2 Might
flavorText:
"I guess I could...throw it at someone
—Miss Fortune"

name: Here to Help
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide now for Rune to react with later for 0.)
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
You may play a unit from hand to a battlefield you control, reducing its cost by 3.

name: Lucian - Merciless (Alternate Art)
description:
[WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for 1 Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
The first time I conquer each turn, ready me.
flavorText: <em>"One of us finds peace. One of us walks away."</e>

name: Doran's Ring
description:
[EQUIP Chaos] (Chaos: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I conquer, discard 1, then draw 1. +1 Might

name: Irelia - Graceful
description: Your spells that choose me cost 1 or Rune less.
flavorText: "None can do what I do; so I will do it."

name: Irelia - Graceful (Alternate Art)
description: Your spells that choose me cost 1 or Rune less.
flavorText: "None can do what I do; so I will do it."

name: Ahri - Inquisitive (Signature)
description: When I attack or defend, give an enemy unit here -2 Might this turn, to a minimum of 1 Might.
flavorText: "Just remember...to follow the fox."

name: Rumble - Mechanized Menace
description: Your Mechs have [SHIELD]. +1 Might while they're defenders.)

name: Danger Zone
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[REPEAT] 1 Rune (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give your Mechs +1 Might this turn

name: Lucian - Purifier
description: Your Equipment each give [ASSAULT]. (+1 Might while equipped unit is an attacker.)

name: Relentless Pursuit
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move a friendly unit. You may attach an Equipment with the same controller to it. This turn, that unit has "When I conquer, you may move me to my base."

name: Rek'sai - Void Burrower
description: When you conquer, you may exhaust me to reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one. Then recycle the rest.

name: Void Rush
description: Reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one of them, reducing its cost by 2. Draw any you did not play this way.

name: Ornn - Fire Below the Mountain
description: Exhaust: [REACTION] — [ADD] Rune. Use only to play gear or use gear abilities. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Jax - Grandmaster At Arms
description:
1, Exhaust: Attach a detached Equipment you control to a unit you control.
Exhaust: Attach an attached Equipment you control to a unit you control.

name: Defiant Dance
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit +2 Might this turn and another unit -2 Might this turn.
flavorText:
"I am both the tranquil sea and the tempst."
—Irelia

name: Ezreal - Prodigal Explorer
description: Exhaust: [REACTION] — Draw 1. Use only if you've chosen enemy units and/or gear twice this turn with spells or unit abilities.

name: Fiora - Grand Duelist
description: When one of your units becomes [MIGHTY], you may exhaust me to channel 1 rune exhausted. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ Might.)

name: Irelia - Fervent (Overnumbered)
description:
DEFLECT (Opponents must pay Rune to choose me with a spell or ability)
When you choose or ready me, give me +1 Might this turn.
flavorText: "Everyone has purpose."

name: Irelia - Fervent (Signature)
description:
DEFLECT (Opponents must pay Rune to choose me with a spell or ability)
When you choose or ready me, give me +1 Might this turn.
flavorText: "Everyone has purpose."

name: Seal of Discord (Overnumbered)
description: Exhaust: REACTION - ADD chaos. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Rumble - Mechanized Menace (Overnumbered)
description: Your Mechs have [SHIELD]. +1 Might while they're defenders.)

name: Ornn - Fire Below the Mountain (Overnumbered)
cleanName: Ornn Fire Below the Mountain Overnumbered
description: Exhaust: [REACTION] — [ADD] Rune. Use only to play gear or use gear abilities. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Plundering Poro
description: When I conquer, play a Gold gear token exhausted.
flavorText: Piracy is the universal language.

name: Vayne - Hunter (Overnumbered)
description:
ASSAULT 3 (+3 Might while I'm an attacker.)

If an opponent controls a battlefield, I enter ready.

When I conquer, you may pay 1 to return me to my owner's hand.
flavorText: "On wings of night."

name: Vayne - Hunter (Signature)
description:
ASSAULT 3 (+3 Might while I'm an attacker.)

If an opponent controls a battlefield, I enter ready.

When I conquer, you may pay 1 to return me to my owner's hand.
flavorText: "On wings of night."

name: Sett - Brawler (Overnumbered)
description:
When I'm played and when I conquer, buff me. (If I don't have a buff, I get a +1 Might buff.)

Spend my buff: Give me +4 Might this turn.
flavorText: "Kings or beggars—all the same to me."

name: Sett - Brawler (Signature)
description:
When I'm played and when I conquer, buff me. (If I don't have a buff, I get a +1 Might buff.)

Spend my buff: Give me +4 Might this turn.
flavorText: "Kings or beggars—all the same to me."

name: Seal of Focus (Overnumbered)
description: Exhaust: REACTION - ADD calm. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Seal of Strength (Overnumbered)
description: Exhaust: REACTION - ADD body. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Treasure Hunter
description: When I move, play a Gold gear token exhausted.
flavorText: "I'm sure they won't miss it."

name: Honest Broker
description: [DEATHKNELL] — Play a gold gear token exhausted. (When I die, get the effect.)
flavorText: Among criminals, gangsters, and thieves, she trades in the most valuable currency: trust.

name: Kato the Arm
description:
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
When I move to a battlefield, give a friendly unit my keywords and +Might equal to my Might this turn.
flavorText: "Let's give "em a good show!."

name: Unsung Hero
description: [DEATHKNELL] — If I was [MIGHTY], draw 2. (When I die, get the effect. I'm Mighty while I have 5+ Might.)
flavorText: She gave everything she had for the cause—even her legacy.

name: Veteran Poro
description: [WEAPONMASTER] <em>(When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
flavorText:
Train hard, little poro, and one day you will be strong."
—Braum

name: Dauntless Vanguard
description: You may play me to an occupied enemy battlefield.
flavorText: When the Demacian Elite receive an order, their commander considers the mission complete.

name: Buhru Captain
description: When you play me, you may draw 1 or buff me. (To buff a unit, give it a +1 Might buff if it doesn't already have one.)
flavorText: "The Buhru knew these waters long before the flotsam of Bilgewater washed up on our shores. We know them still."

name: Jaull-Fish
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 Body as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
I cost 2 less for each of your [MIGHTY] units. A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ Might.)
flavorText: It's not hungry. It's not territorial. It just really hates boats.

name: Called Shot
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[REPEAT Chaos] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Look at the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. Draw one and recycle the other.

name: World Atlas
description:
[EQUIP Mind] (Mind: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I hold, play two Gold gear tokens exhausted. +2 Might

name: Altar of Memories
description: When a friendly unit dies, you may exhaust me to draw 1, then put a card from your hand on the top or bottom of your Main Deck.
flavorText:
"The spider demands sacrifice."
—Elise

name: Warmog's Armor
description:
[EQUIP Body] (Body: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I conquer, buff me. (If I don't have a buff, I get a +1 Might buff.)+1 Might

name: B.F. Sword
description:
[EQUIP Order] (Order: Attach this to a unit you control.)
+3 Might
flavorText: It certainly is big.

name: Yone - Blademaster
description:
[WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
When I conquer an open battlefield, deal damage equal to my Might to an enemy unit in a base.

name: Bellows Breath
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[REPEAT 1, Mind] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Deal 1 to up to three units at the same location.
flavorText: "My work speaks in the roar of flame and the ringing of steel."—Ornn

name: Jax - Unrelenting
description:
[WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [Equip] one of your Equipment to me for 1 Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
When you attach an Equipment to me, you may pay 1 to draw 1.

name: Piercing Light
description:
[REPEAT 2, Fury] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Deal 2 to a unit at a battlefield, then deal 2 to up to one other unit.
flavorText: "I got two good reasons for your to turn back."—Lucian

name: Rell - Magnetic
description:
[TANK] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)
When I attack, you may play an Equipment with Energy cost no more than 2, ignoring its cost, and attach it to me.
flavorText: "Bones shatter and people lie, but I can always count on iron."

name: Premonition
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 3.
flavorText: Wisdom through power, power through wisdom.

name: Strike Down
description: Choose an equipped friendly unit. It deals damage equal to its Might to an enemy unit. Then detach an Equipment from it.
flavorText: "Is that all it takes?"

name: Jax - Unrelenting (Alternate Art)
description:
[WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [Equip] one of your Equipment to me for 1 Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
When you attach an Equipment to me, you may pay 1 to draw 1.

name: Loyal Pup
description: When you defend at a battlefield, you may move me there.
flavorText: "Arf!"

name: Boots of Swiftness
description:
[EQUIP Chaos] (Chaos: Attach this to a unit you control.)
[GANKING] (I can move from battlefield to battlefield)

name: Windsinger
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide now for 1 Rune to reach later for 0.)
When you play me, you may return another unit at a battlefield with 3 Might or less to its owner's hand.
flavorText: She never sticks around for encores.

name: Switcheroo
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide now for 1 Rune to reach later for 0.)
[ACTION] {Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Swap the Might of two units at the same battlefield this turn.
flavorText: Always look out for the little guy.

name: Draven - Audacious
description:
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
The first time I win a combat each turn, you score 1 point.
When I die in combat, choose an opponent. They score 1 point.

name: Draven - Audacious (Alternate Art)
description:
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
The first time I win a combat each turn, you score 1 point.
When I die in combat, choose an opponent. They score 1 point.

name: Last Rites
description:
[EQUIP] — Chaos, Recycle 2 cards from your trash. (Pay the cost: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I conquer or hold, you may play a unit from your trash. (You still pay its costs.)

name: Rek'Sai - Swarm Queen
description: When I attack, you may reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one. Then recycle the rest. If the played card is a unit, you may play it here.
flavorText: "KKRRKRKRRKKRKK!"

name: Rek'Sai - Swarm Queen (Alternate Art)
description: When I attack, you may reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one. Then recycle the rest. If the played card is a unit, you may play it here.
flavorText: "KKRRKRKRRKKRKK!"

name: Fiora - Worthy
description: When a unit you control becomes [MIGHTY], you may pay Order to ready it. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ Might.)
flavorText: "Strike quickly. Strike deftly."

name: Fiora - Worthy (Alternate Art)
description: When a unit you control becomes [MIGHTY], you may pay Order to ready it. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ Might.)
flavorText: "Strike quickly. Strike deftly."

name: Treasure Hoard
description: When you conquer here, you may pay 1 to play a Gold gear token exhausted.

name: Draven - Glorious Executioner (Overnumbered)
description: When you win a combat, draw 1. (You win if only your units remain after combat.)

name: Fiora - Grand Duelist (Overnumbered)
description: When one of your units becomes [MIGHTY], you may exhaust me to channel 1 rune exhausted. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ Might.)

name: Void Drone
description: I cost 2 less to play from anywhere other than your hand.
flavorText: Rek'Sai's children appear without warning, ambushing their prey from beneath the shuriman sands.

name: Boneshiver
description:
[EQUIP 1 Body] (1 Body: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I conquer, channel 1 rune exhausted. Might +2.

name: Renata Glasc - Industrialist
description: Your tokens enter ready.
flavorText: "Nothing's free. All I ask is your loyalty."

name: Against the Odds
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a friendly unit at a battlefield +2 Might this turn for each enemy unit there.
flavorText:
"We are what we overcome."
—Pantheon

name: Stellacorn Herder
description: When I move, draw 1.
flavorText: "Finding lost stellacorns is easy! It's catching them that's the hard part."

name: Void Hatchling
description: If you would reveal cards from a deck, look at the top card first. You may recycle it. Then reveal those cards.
flavorText: From the moment of hatching, xer'sai serve their queen.

name: Aphelios - Exalted
description:
When you attach an Equipment to me, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn —
•Ready 2 runes.
•Channel 1 rune exhausted.
•Buff a friendly unit.

name: Power Nexus
description: When you hold here, you may pay Rune Rune Rune Rune to score 1 point.

name: Vex - Cheerless
description: While I'm in combat, friendly spells cost 1 Rune less to a minium of 1, and enemy spells cost 1 Rune more.
flavorText: "Let's turn these smiles upside down."

name: Ezreal - Dashing
description:
When I attack or defend, deal damage equal to my Might to an enemy unit here.
I don't deal combat damage.
Mind: [ACTION] — Move me to your base.
flavorText: "Time for a true display of skill."

name: Royal Entourage
description: When you play me, ready or exhaust a legend.
flavorText: After the seat of the ancient Shuriman Empire rose from the sands and its immortal emperor stepped out of myth to lead it, those who first embraced his rule were richly rewarded.

name: Gem Jammer
description: When you play me, give a unit [GANKING] this turn. (It can move from battlefield to battlefield)
flavorText: "You have GOT to see this."

name: Not So Fast
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter an enemy spell or ability that chooses a friendly unit or gear.

name: Ravenbloom Conservatory
description: When you defend here, reveal the top card of your Main Deck. If it's a spell, put it in your hand. Otherwise, recycle it.

name: Darius - Executioner (Overnumbered)
description:
LEGION - When you play me, ready me. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn)

Other friendly units have +1 might here.
flavorText: "Even in death, I cannot lay down my axe."

name: Darius - Executioner (Signature)
description:
LEGION - When you play me, ready me. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn)

Other friendly units have +1 might here.
flavorText: "Even in death, I cannot lay down my axe."

name: Frostcoat Cub
description:
You may pay Mind as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, give a unit -2 Might this turn.
flavorText: In the Freljord, cuteness is just another survival tactic.

name: Ferrous Forerunner
description: [DEATHKNELL] — Play two 3 Might Mech unit tokens to your base. (When I die, get the effect.)
flavorText: "You see a wreck waiting to happen. I just see parts that aren't spare yet."

name: Rengar - Pouncing
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve, including to a battlefield you control.)
[ASSAULT 2] (+2 Might while I'm an attacker.)
I can be played to a battlefield you're attacking.
flavorText: "Tonight, we hunt!"

name: Dunebreaker
description:
If you have two or fewer cards in your hand, I enter ready.
When I hold, draw 2.
flavorText: Dunes don't break like branches. They break like waves.

name: Thwonk!
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[REPEAT] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Stun an attacking unit. (It doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)

name: Brutalizer
description:
[EQUIP Calm] (Calm: Attach this to a unit you control.)
If this was attached to me this turn, I have an additional +2 Might.
+1 Might.

name: Azir - Ascendant (Alternate Art)
description: Calm: [ACTION] — Choose a unit you control. Move me to its location and it to my original location. If it's equipped, you may attach one of its Equipment to me. Use only once per turn.
flavorText: "Challenge Shurima, challenge fate."

name: Azir - Ascendant
description: Calm: [ACTION] — Choose a unit you control. Move me to its location and it to my original location. If it's equipped, you may attach one of its Equipment to me. Use only once per turn.
flavorText: "Challenge Shurima, challenge fate."

name: Jax - Unmatched
description:
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
Each Equipment in your hand has [QUICK-DRAW]. (It gains [REACTION]. When you play it, attach it to a unit you control.)
flavorText: "Fighting Words! My favorite kind."

name: Jax - Unmatched (Alternate Art)
description:
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
Each Equipment in your hand has [QUICK-DRAW]. (It gains [REACTION]. When you play it, attach it to a unit you control.)
flavorText: "Fighting Words! My favorite kind."

name: Needlessly Large Yordle
description:
[SHIELD 5] (+5 Might while I'm a defender.)
[TANK] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)
I cost 2 and 1 Calm less for each point you scored from holding this turn.
flavorText: How did a yordle get so big? You're welcome to ask him.

name: Ornn - Blacksmith
description: When you play me or when I hold, look at the top 4 cards of your Main Deck. You may reveal a gear from among them and draw it. Then recycle the rest.
flavorText: "Gods do not need followers. Followers need gods."

name: Ornn - Blacksmith (Alternate Art)
description: When you play me or when I hold, look at the top 4 cards of your Main Deck. You may reveal a gear from among them and draw it. Then recycle the rest.
flavorText: "Gods do not need followers. Followers need gods."

name: Tianna Crownguard
description:
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
While I'm at a battlefield, opponents can't score points.
flavorText: "I will stand for my country, my family, and nothing else."

name: Bubble Bot
description: When you play me, ready another friendly Mech.
flavorText: The first Bubble Bot started as a practical joke in the scrapyard, but the Mark II soon replaced the morning wake-up bell.

name: Chemtech Cask
description: When you play a spell on an opponent's turn, you may exhaust me to play a Gold gear token exhausted.
flavorText:
"Piltover coos over perfumes while Zaun struggles to breathe."
—Renata Glasc

name: Breakneck Mech
description:
Your Mechs have [DEFLECT] and [GANKING]. (Opponents must pay 1 Rune to choose us with a spell or ability. We can move from battlefield to battlefield.)
I enter ready if you control another Mech.

name: Experimental Hexplate
description:
[EQUIP Calm] (Calm: Attach this to a unit you control.)
I am a mech.
+1 Might

name: Prize of Progress
description: When you use an activated ability of a gear, give me +1 Might this turn.
flavorText: In Piltover's Progress Day parade, even the floats are groundbreaking innovations.

name: Bard - Mercurial
description:
You may exhaust your legend as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, move any number of your units to an open battlefield.
flavorText: (Mysterious chiming noises intensify.)

name: Ezreal - Dashing (Alternate Art)
description:
When I attack or defend, deal damage equal to my Might to an enemy unit here.
I don't deal combat damage.
Mind: [ACTION] — Move me to your base.
flavorText: "Time for a true display of skill."

name: Jayce - Man of Progress
description: When you play me, you may kill a friendly gear. If you do, you may play a gear with Energy cost no more than 7 from hand this turn, ignoring its Energy cost. (You must still pay its Power cost.)
flavorText: "This is what the future looks like."

name: Ornn - Forge God
description:
[DEFLECT 2] (Opponents must pay 2 Runes to choose me with a spell or ability.) [WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for 1 Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
I have +1 Might for each friendly gear.

name: Ornn - Forge God (Alternate Art)
description:
[DEFLECT 2] (Opponents must pay 2 Runes to choose me with a spell or ability.) [WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for 1 Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
I have +1 Might for each friendly gear.

name: Yordle Explorer
description: When you play a card with Power cost 2 Runes or more, draw 1.
flavorText: "We can't stop yet! We're just getting started!"

name: Rek'sai - Void Burrower (Overnumbered)
description: When you conquer, you may exhaust me to reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one. Then recycle the rest.

name: Lucian - Purifier (Overnumbered)
description: Your Equipment each give [ASSAULT]. (+1 Might while equipped unit is an attacker.)

name: Yone - Blademaster (Overnumbered)
description:
[WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
When I conquer an open battlefield, deal damage equal to my Might to an enemy unit in a base.

name: Yone - Blademaster (Signature)
description:
[WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
When I conquer an open battlefield, deal damage equal to my Might to an enemy unit in a base.

name: Corina Veraza
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 and Order as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
When I move to a battlefield, play three 1 Might Recruit unit tokens here.
flavorText: "I told them that every achievement has its cost. I didn't tell them who would pay it."

name: Azir - Sovereign
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 and Order as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
When I attack, you may move any number of your token units to this battlefield.
flavorText: "You need not follow, but you must witness."

name: Azir - Sovereign (Alternate Art)
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 and Order as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
When I attack, you may move any number of your token units to this battlefield.
flavorText: "You need not follow, but you must witness."

name: Renata Glasc - Industrialist (Alternate Art)
description: Your tokens enter ready.
flavorText: "Nothing's free. All I ask is your loyalty."

name: Downwell
description: Return all units and gear to their owners' hands.
flavorText: Sunk costs have a very painful definition in Bilgewater Bay

name: Sivir - Ambitious
description:
[DEFLECT 2] (Opponents must pay to choose me with a spell or Ability.)
When I conquer after an attack, if you assigned 5 or more excess damage to enemy units, you may deal that much to an enemy unit.
flavorText: "Honor is the rust on a dull blade."

name: Sivir - Ambitious (Alternate Art)
description:
[DEFLECT 2] (Opponents must pay to choose me with a spell or Ability.)
When I conquer after an attack, if you assigned 5 or more excess damage to enemy units, you may deal that much to an enemy unit.
flavorText: "Honor is the rust on a dull blade."

name: Ancient Henge
description: Exhaust: [REACTION] — Pay any amount of Energy to [ADD] that much Rune. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)
flavorText: "It's not enough to protect a pile of ice and stone. We must protect each other, and build a community on the foundations our ancestors left us." —Ashe

name: Xin Zhao - Vigilant
description:
[TANK] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)
I enter ready if you have two or more other units in your base.
flavorText: "A Demacian does not retreat!"

name: Undertitan
description:
When you play me, give your other units +2 Might this turn.
As I'm revealed from your deck, [ADD] 2.
flavorText: If it stayed under, it would be less of a problem.

name: Trove Golem
description: When you play me, play four Gold gear tokens exhausted.
flavorText: As expensive as it is expansive.

name: Soraka - Wanderer
description:
I must be assigned combat damage last.
If another unit you control here would die, if it has less Might than me, instead heal it, exhaust it, and recall it. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.)
flavorText: "Never waste a breath."

name: Sacred Shears
description:
[EQUIP Order] (Order: Attach this to a unit you control.)
[DEATHKNELL] - Draw 1. (When I die, get the effect.)
+1 Might

name: Jae Medarda
description: When you choose me with a spell, draw 1.
flavorText: A scion of the militant Medarda family, Jae seeks enchanted treasure rather than power or glory.

name: Fizz - Trickster
description: When you play me, you may play a spell from your trash with Energy cost no more than 3, ignoring its Energy cost. Recycle that spell after you play it. (You must still pay its Power cost.)
flavorText: "One jump ahead of you."

name: Marching Orders
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[REPEAT 3] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Choose a friendly unit anywhere and an enemy unit at a battlefield. They deal damage equal to their Mights to each other.

name: Aspiring Engineer
description: When you play me, return a gear from your trash to your hand.
flavorText: "Before you know it, I'll be running this place."

name: Ornn's Forge
description: While you control this battlefield, the first friendly non-token gear played each turn costs 1 less.

name: Rek'Sai - Breacher
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 Fury as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
[ASSAULT] (+1 Might while I'm an attacker.)
Friendly units played from anywhere other than a player's hand have [ACCELERATE].

name: Vanguard Armory
description: Exhaust: Play three 1 Might Recruit unit tokens. (You may play them to different locations.)
flavorText: It takes more than a sword and shield to make a soldier. But it's a good start.

name: Glasc Mixologist
description: [DEATHKNELL] — You may play a unit with cost no more than 3 and no more than from your trash, ignoring its cost. (When I die, get the effect.)
flavorText: "The difference between medicine and poison is the dosage."—Renata Glasc

name: Drag Under
description:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
I cost less to play from anywhere other than your hand.
Kill a unit at a battlefield.
flavorText: "If we hurry, we can reach the oasis by nightfall."—Common last words

name: Royal Guard
description: When you play me, play a 2 Might Sand Soldier unit token here.
flavorText: A ruler's true power is in the loyalty they inspire.

name: Bonds of Strength
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[REPEAT 2] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give two friendly units each +1 Might this turn.
flavorText: A vow is stronger than the words that make it.

name: Hard Bargain
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[REPEAT 2] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Counter a spell unless its controller pays 2.

name: Punch First
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Give a unit +5 Might this turn.
flavorText: It's not for the inquisitive.

name: Production Surge
description:
This costs 2 less if you control a Mech.
Play a 3 Might Mech unit token to your base.
Draw 1.
flavorText: When in doubt, make more mechs.

name: Rocket Barrage
description:
[REPEAT 4 Mind] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect, and may make different choices.)
Choose one —
• Deal 4 to a unit in a base.
• Kill a gear.

name: Disarming Rake
description: When you play me, you may kill a gear.
flavorText: "I like to break things: swords, arms, hearts..."

name: Guardian of the Passage
description: When I hold, you may return a unit or gear from your trash to your hand.
flavorText: In the Shadow Isles, the veil between life and death is thin indeed.

name: Lonely Poro
description: [DEATHKNELL] — If I died alone, draw 1. (When I die, get the effect. I'm alone if there are no other friendly units here.)
flavorText:
Far from fluft and all alone
None to mourn but ice and stone
—Ode to a Lonely Poro

name: Apprentice Smith
description: When I move, reveal the top card of your Main Deck. If it's a gear, draw it. Otherwise, recycle it.
flavorText: "My mentor says every failed project is a lesson. Me, I use 'em as paperweights."

name: Legion Quartermaster
description: As an additional cost to play me, return a friendly gear to its owner's hand.
flavorText: "An ancient runeblade! Very rare. Take it to Tent 3 for processing."

name: Janna - Savior
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve, including to a battlefield you control.)
When you play me, heal your units here, then move an enemy unit from here to its base.
flavorText: "Gale winds unleashed!"

name: Ruin Runner
description: I can't be chosen by enemy spells and abilities.
flavorText: "Catch me if you can."

name: Card Sharp
description: When you play me, you and each opponent may play a Gold gear token exhausted. For each opponent who did, you play a Gold gear token exhausted.
flavorText: "Call."

name: Hextech Anomaly
description: Exhaust: [REACTION] — Pay any amount of Runes to [ADD] that much Energy. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)
flavorText: "Hextech promises to transform the present. But progress must not come at the future's expense!"— Heimerdinger

name: Rumble - Scrapper
description:
Your Mechs have +1 Might (including me).
When I hold, play a 3 Might Mech unit token to your base.
flavorText: "Ever look up to a yordle?"

name: Rumble - Scrapper (Alternate Art)
description:
Your Mechs have +1 Might (including me).
When I hold, play a 3 Might Mech unit token to your base.
flavorText: "Ever look up to a yordle?"

name: The Zero Drive
description:
[EQUIP 1, Calm] (1, Calm: Attach this to a unit you control.)
3, Calm, Banish this: Play all units banished with this, ignoring their costs. (Use only if unattached.)
[DEATHKNELL] — Banish me. (When I die, get the effect.)
Might +2

name: Fiora - Peerless
description: When I attack or defend one on one, double my Might this combat.
flavorText: "I have no equal."

name: Fiora - Peerless (Alternate Art)
description: When I attack or defend one on one, double my Might this combat.
flavorText: "I have no equal."

name: Edge of Night
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide now for 1 Rune to react with later for 0.)
When you play this from face down, attach it to a unit you control here.
[Equip Chaos] (Chaos: Attach this to a unit you control.)
+2 Might
flavorText: Every shadow an ally.

name: Sivir - Mercenary
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1, Chaos as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
If you've spent at least 2 Runes this turn, I have +2 Might and [GANKING]. (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)

name: Sivir - Mercenary (Alternate Art)
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1, Chaos as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
If you've spent at least 2 Runes this turn, I have +2 Might and [GANKING]. (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)

name: Lucian - Gunslinger (Alternate Art)
description:
[ASSAULT] (+1 Might while I'm an attacker.)
When I attack, deal damage equal to my [ASSAULT] to an enemy unit here.
flavorText: "Everybody dies. Some just need a little help."

name: Lucian - Gunslinger
description:
[ASSAULT] (+1 Might while I'm an attacker.)
When I attack, deal damage equal to my [ASSAULT] to an enemy unit here.
flavorText: "Everybody dies. Some just need a little help."

name: Rek'Sai - Breacher (Alternate Art)
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 Fury as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
[ASSAULT] (+1 Might while I'm an attacker.)
Friendly units played from anywhere other than a player's hand have [ACCELERATE].

name: Sivir - Battle Mistress (Overnumbered)
description:
When you recycle a rune, you may exhaust me to play a Gold gear token exhausted.
When one or more enemy units die, ready me.

name: Ezreal - Prodigal Explorer (Overnumbered)
description: Exhaust: [REACTION] — Draw 1. Use only if you've chosen enemy units and/or gear twice this turn with spells or unit abilities.

name: Azir - Emperor of the Sands (Overnumbered)
cleanName: Azir Emperor of the Sands Overnumbered
description:
Your Sand Soldiers have [WEAPONMASTER].
1, Exhaust: Play a 2 Might Sand Soldier unit token to your base. Use only if you've played an Equipment this turn.

name: Jax - Grandmaster At Arms (Overnumbered)
description:
1, Exhaust: Attach a detached Equipment you control to a unit you control.
Exhaust: Attach an attached Equipment you control to a unit you control.

name: Soraka - Wanderer (Signature)
description:
I must be assigned combat damage last.
If another unit you control here would die, if it has less Might than me, instead heal it, exhaust it, and recall it. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.)
flavorText: "Never waste a breath."

name: Soraka - Wanderer (Overnumbered)
description:
I must be assigned combat damage last.
If another unit you control here would die, if it has less Might than me, instead heal it, exhaust it, and recall it. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.)
flavorText: "Never waste a breath."

name: Seal of Unity (Overnumbered)
description: Exhaust: [REACTION] - [ADD] Order. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Seal of Insight (Overnumbered)
description: Exhaust: [REACTION] - [ADD] Mind. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Aphelios - Exalted (Signature)
description:
When you attach an Equipment to me, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn —
•Ready 2 runes.
•Channel 1 rune exhausted.
•Buff a friendly unit.

name: Aphelios - Exalted (Overnumbered)
description:
When you attach an Equipment to me, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn —
•Ready 2 runes.
•Channel 1 rune exhausted.
•Buff a friendly unit.

name: Seal of Rage (Overnumbered)
description: Exhaust: REACTION - ADD 1 Fury. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Armed Assailant
description: [ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 and Fury as an additional cost to have me enter ready.) [WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for 1 Rune less, even if it's already attached.)

name: Forgefire Cape
description:
[UNIQUE] (Your deck can have only 1 card with this name.)
[EQUIP Rune] (Rune: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I attack or defend, deal 2 to all enemy units here. +3 Might.

name: Blood Rush
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[REPEAT 1] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give a unit [ASSAULT 2]. (+2 while it's an attacker.)

name: Bushwack
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide now for 1 Rune to react with later for 0.)
Friendly units enter ready this turn. Play a Gold gear token exhausted.
flavorText: Always check the bush.

name: Detonate
description: Kill a gear. Its controller draws 2.
flavorText: Nobody wants to be left holding the explosive end of the stick.

name: Eager Drakehound
description: I enter ready.
flavorText: There are two kinds of drakehound trainer: strict, and dead.

name: Rabadon's Deathcrown
description:
[UNIQUE] (Your deck can have only 1 card with this name.)
[EQUIP Rune] (Rune: Attach this to a unit you control.)
Your spells and abilities deal 3 Bonus Damage (while this is attached). +3 Might

name: Sentinel Adept
description: [WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [Equip] one of your Equipment to me for 1 Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
flavorText: "My turn."

name: Shurelya's Requiem
description:
[UNIQUE] (Your deck can have only 1 card with this name.)
[EQUIP Rune] (Rune: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When you play this, ready your units.
Your units here have [GANKING] (We can move from battlefield to battlefield.). +2 Might

name: Serrated Dirk
description:
[EQUIP Fury] (Fury: Attach this to a unit you control.)
[ASSAULT 2] (+2 Might while I'm attacking.)
Might +0

name: Angle Shot
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Choose a unit and an Equipment with the same controller. Attach that Equipment to that unit or detach that Equipment from that unit. Draw 1.
flavorText: "Admit it, you're hooked."

name: Battering Ram
description: I cost 1 less for each card you've played this turn, to a minimum of 1.
flavorText: They call it "the Noxian hello."

name: Blast Corps Cadet
description:
You may pay 1 and Fury as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, deal 2 to a unit at a battlefield.
flavorText: The bigger the bangs, the less you have to aim.

name: Minotaur Reckoner
description: Units can't move to base.
flavorText: He is blessed with immense patience, a gift he feels compelled to share.

name: Perched Grimwyrm
description: Play me only to a battlefield you conquered this turn. (You can't play me anywhere else.)
flavorText: When you see the Grimwyrm's shadow, it's already too late.

name: Recurve Bow
description:
[EQUIP Fury] (Fury: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I attack or defend, deal 2 to an enemy unit here.
Might +0

name: Counter Strike
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Choose a unit. The next time that unit would be dealt damage this turn, prevent it. Draw 1.
flavorText:
"That all you got?!"
—Jax

name: Sudden Storm
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide now for 0 to react with later for 0.)
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Deal 2 to a unit at a battlefield. If it's attacking, deal 4 to it instead.
flavorText: Haste makes waste.

name: Assembly Rig
description: 1, Fury, Recycle a unit from your trash, Exhaust: Play a 3 Might Mech unit token to your base.
flavorText: "Can't believe someone would throw this out!"

name: Arise!
description: Play a 2 Might Sand Soldier unit token for each Equipment you control. Then ready two of them.
flavorText:
"The order is given!"
—Azir

name: Rumble - Hotheaded
description:
Your Mechs each have [ASSAULT]. (+1 while we're attackers.)
When I conquer, you may recycle another friendly unit to play a Mech from your trash. Reduce its Energy cost by the Might of the unit you recycled.

name: Rumble - Hotheaded (Alternate Art)
description:
Your Mechs each have [ASSAULT]. (+1 while we're attackers.)
When I conquer, you may recycle another friendly unit to play a Mech from your trash. Reduce its Energy cost by the Might of the unit you recycled.

name: Arcane Shift
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Banish a friendly unit, then its owner lays it, ignoring its cost. Deal 3 to an enemy unit at a battlefield. Banish this.
flavorText:
"Hah! I can blink and still not miss."
—Ezreal

name: Skyfall of Areion
description:
[EQUIP 1, Fury] (1, Fury: Attach this to a unit you control.)
My hold effects are also conquer effects, and vice verse.
Might +2

name: Black Market Broker
description: When you play a card from face down, play a gold gear token exhausted.
flavorText: "Top of the line. Never used. And no pesky licenses to worry about."

name: Hostile Takeover
description:
[Hidden] (Hide now for Rune to react with later for 0)
Take control of an enemy unit at a battlefield. Ready it. (Start a combat if other enemies are there. Otherwise, conquer.)
Lose control of that unit and recall it at end of turn. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.)

name: Spirit Wheel
description: When you choose a friendly unit, you may pay 1 and exhaust this to draw 1.
flavorText: Never broken.

name: On the Hunt
description: Ready your units.
flavorText:
"Step light, strike hard."
—Sivir

name: Ezreal - Prodigy
description:
When you play me, discard 1, then draw 2.
Optional additional costs you pay cost 1 or 1 Rune less.
flavorText: "Who needs a map?"

name: Ezreal - Prodigy (Alternate Art)
description:
When you play me, discard 1, then draw 2.
Optional additional costs you pay cost 1 or 1 Rune less.
flavorText: "Who needs a map?"

name: Corrupt Enforcer
description:
When I move to a battlefield, discard 1.
When I win combat, draw 1.
flavorText: In his eyes, the law binds but does not protect.

name: Riposte
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Choose a friendly unit and a spell. Counter that spell and give that unit + Might equal to that spell's Energy cost this turn.
flavorText:
"Too slow!."
—Fiora

name: Fae Porter
description: When I move to a battlefield, you may pay Chaos to move a unit you control to the same battlefield.
flavorText: A surprisingly soft landing.

name: Desert's Call
description:
[REPEAT 2] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect)
Play a 2 Might Sand Soldier unit token.
flavorText: The Great Sai desert hides as many spears as it does secrets.

name: Master Bingwen
description: [WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] one of your Equipment to me for 1 Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
flavorText: "Perceive your own weakness, before your opponent does."

name: Navori Scout
description: [DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.)
flavorText: The Navori Brotherhood has neither a height requirement nor a retirement age.

name: Temptation
description:
[REPEAT 2] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Move an enemy unit to a location where there's a unit with the same controller.
flavorText: Seems legit.

name: Ancient Warmonger
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 and Chaos as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
I have [ASSAULT] equal to the number of enemy units here. (+1 Might while I'm an attacker for each instance of Assault.)

name: Ribbon Dancer
description: When I move to a battlefield, give another friendly unit +1 Might this turn.
flavorText: A flutter of silk is all the warning her enemies get.

name: Beast Below
description: When you play me, return another friendly unit and an enemy unit to their owners' hands.
flavorText: Terror knows no allegiance.

name: Cull
description:
[EQUIP Chaos] (Chaos: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I conquer play a Gold gear token exhausted.
Might +1

name: Factory Recall
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns)
Return a gear to its owner's hand.
flavorText: "NO REFUNDS!"

name: Emperor's Divide
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide for now Rune to react with later for 0.)
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move any number of friendly units at a battlefield on their base.
flavorText: The sands of battle shift of Azir's command.

name: Harpoon Squad
description: When I move from a battlefield, give me +2 might this turn.
flavorText: No room for fear on the boat.

name: Poro Snax
description:
When you play this, draw 1.
1 Calm, Exhaust, Kill this: Draw 1.
flavorText:
"Eat, eat and grow strong!."
—Braum

name: Simian Ancestor
description: When you buff me, ready me.
flavorText: "I'm faster than I look. Older too, if you can believe it."

name: Heart of Dark Ice
description: Exhaust: Give a unit +3 Might this turn.
flavorText:
"All will knee...in time."
—Lissandra

name: Eminent Benefactor
description: When I hold, play two Gold gear tokens exhausted.
flavorText: Few things are more costly than free money.

name: Eye of the Herald
description:
[EQUIP Order] (Order: Attach this to a unit you control.)
When I move, play a 1 Might Recruit unit token here.

name: Guards!
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide now for Rune to react with later for 0.)
Play a 2 Might Sand Soldier unit token. You may pay Order to ready it.
flavorText:
"My empire lives in every grain of sand."
—Azir

name: Laurent Duelist
description: [ASSAULT 2] (+2 Might while I'm an attacker.)
flavorText: "No my old foil, this isn't revenge—it's épéeback."

name: Cloth Armor
description:
[QUICK-DRAW] (This has [REACTION]. When you play it, attach it to a unit you control.)
[EQUIP Mind] (Mind: Attach this to a unit you control.)
[SHIELD 2] (+2 Might while I'm a defender.)
Might +2

name: Forecaster
description: Your Mechs have [VISION]. (When you play us, look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)
flavorText: A good mech pilot has quick reflexes. A great one doesn't need them.

name: Sandshifter
description: When you play me, kill an enemy unit with 3 Might or less.
flavorText: "Recognize your emperor... or the sands will make you."

name: Frigid Touch
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[REPEAT 2] (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give a unit -2 Might this turn.
flavorText: "Freeze."

name: Gearhead
description:
[ACCELERATE] (You may pay 1 and Mind as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
Each Equipment attached to me gives double its base Might bonus.
flavorText: "Some people dream about the future. I'm living it."

name: Trusty Ramhound
description: While you have another unit here, I have +1 Might.
flavorText: It's always best to have a dog in the fight.

name: Wages of Pain
description:
[HIDDEN] (Hide now for 1 Rune to react with later for 0.)
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Deal 3 to a unit at a battlefield. Play a Gold gear token exhausted.
flavorText: Smash AND grab.

name: Zaun Punk
description:
You may kill a friendly gear as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, kill a gear.
flavorText: The Guitar isn't the only thing he shreds.

name: Dropboarder
description: When you play me, if you control two or more gear, ready me.
flavorText: Piltover prides itself on progress, but the Firelights prove that Zaun is no less inventive.

name: Pickpocket
description: When you play me, you may kill a gear with Energy cost no more than 1. If you do, play a Gold gear token exhausted.
flavorText:
"Sticky fingers never linger."
—Pickpockets' motto

name: Blood Money
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Kill a unit at a battlefield with 2 Might or less. If it was an enemy unit, play a Gold gear token exhausted. If it was a friendly unit, play two BGold gear tokens exhausted.
flavorText: Even among the unscrupulous, betrayal costs extra.

name: Temporal Portal
description: 1 Rune, Exhaust: Give the next spell you play this turn [REPEAT] equal to its cost. (You may pay the additional cost to repeat the spell's effect.)
flavorText: Those who study history get to choose whether they'll repeat it.

name: Deathgrip
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve)
Kill a friendly unit to give +Might equal to its Might to another friendly unit this turn. Draw 1.
flavorText:
"Death is my kindness."
—Mordekaiser

name: Rally the Troops
description:
[ACTION] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
When a friendly unit is played this turn, buff it. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 Might buff.)
Draw 1
flavorText: "DEMACIA!"

name: Renata Glasc - Mastermind
description:
1, Mind: Draw 1.
1,4 Mind, Exhaust: Score 1 point.
Use my abilities only while I'm at a battlefield.
flavorText: "Progress comes at a price others aren't willing to pay."

name: Renata Glasc - Mastermind (Alternate Art)
description:
1, Mind: Draw 1.
1,4 Mind, Exhaust: Score 1 point.
Use my abilities only while I'm at a battlefield.
flavorText: "Progress comes at a price others aren't willing to pay."

name: Combat Chef
description: [WEAPONMASTER] (When you play me, you may [EQUIP] One of your Equipment to me for Rune less, even if it's already attached.)
flavorText: "The tastiest soup is the one you eat after almost getting your head chopped off."

name: Emperor's Dais
description: When you conquer here, you may pay 1 and return a unit you control here to its owner's hand. If you do, play a 2 Might Sand Soldier unit token here.

name: Forge of the Fluft
description: While you control this battlefield, friendly legends have "Exhaust: Attach an Equipment you control to a unit you control."

name: Forgotten Monument
description: Players can't score here until their third turn.

name: Hall of Legends
description: When you conquer here, you may pay 1 to ready your legend.

name: Marai Spire
description: While you control this battlefield, friendly [REPEAT] costs cost 1 less.

name: Minefield
description: When you conquer here, put the top 2 cards of your Main Deck into your trash.

name: Rockfall Path
description: Units can't be played here.

name: Seat of Power
description: When you conquer here, draw 1 for each other battlefield you or allies control.

name: Sunken Temple
description: When you conquer here with one or more [MIGHTY] units, you may pay 1 to draw 1. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ .)

name: The Papertree
description: When you hold here, each player channels 1 rune exhausted.

name: Veiled Temple
description: When you conquer here, you may ready a friendly gear. If it's an Equipment, you may detach it.

name: Direwing
description: I enter ready if you control another Dragon.
flavorText: A dragon's definition of "prey" is all inclusive.

name: Laurent Bladekeeper
description: [GANKING] (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)
flavorText: "This old dog has plenty of tricks already."

name: Sea Monkey
description:
You may pay 1 as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, buff me. (Give me a +1 Might Buff if I don't already have one.)
flavorText:
"Do, monkey."
—Nilah

name: Fae Dragon
description:
When you play me, buff up to four friendly units. (Give each one a +1 Might buff if it doesn't have one.)
When you spend a buff, play a Gold gear token exhausted.
flavorText: The fae who guard the boundary of the spirit realm take their job as seriously as they take anything.

name: Hexdrinker
description:
[EQUIP Body] (Body: Attach this to a unit you control.)
[DEFLECT] (Opponents must pay Rune to choose me with a spell or ability.) +1 Might

name: Petricite Monument
description:
[TEMPORARY] (Kill this at the start of its controller's Beginning Phase, before scoring.)
Friendly units have [DEFLECT]. (Opponents must pay Rune to choose them with a spell or ability.)
flavorText: Monuments of magic-absorbing petricite serve both to protect the Kingdom of Demacia and to celebrate it.

name: Show of Strength
description:
[REACTION] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 1 for each of your [MIGHTY] units. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ Might)
flavorText: Strength in numbers.

name: Akshan - Mischievous
description:
[WEAPONMASTER]
You may pay Body Body as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, move an enemy gear to your base. You control it until I leave the board. If it's an Equipment, attach it to me.

name: Karma - Channeler (Signature)
description:
VISION (When you play me, look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)

When you recycle one or more cards, buff a friendly unit. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 might buff. Runes aren't cards.)
flavorText: "Endings are beginnings with a different face."

name: Karma - Channeler (Overnumbered)
description:
VISION (When you play me, look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)

When you recycle one or more cards, buff a friendly unit. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 might buff. Runes aren't cards.)
flavorText: "Endings are beginnings with a different face."

name: Yasuo - Windrider (Overnumbered)
description:
GANKING (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)

The third time I move in a turn, you score 1 point.
flavorText: "I hope you find the path that brings you joy."

name: Yasuo - Windrider (Signature)
description:
GANKING (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)

The third time I move in a turn, you score 1 point.
flavorText: "I hope you find the path that brings you joy."

name: Teemo - Strategist (Overnumbered)
description:
HIDDEN (Hide now for 1 Rune to react with later for 0.)

When I defend or I'm played from HIDDEN, reveal the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. Deal 1 to an enemy unit here for each card with , then recycle them.

name: Teemo - Strategist (Signature)
description:
HIDDEN (Hide now for 1 Rune to react with later for 0.)

When I defend or I'm played from HIDDEN, reveal the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. Deal 1 to an enemy unit here for each card with , then recycle them.

name: Bard - Mercurial (Overnumbered)
description:
You may exhaust your legend as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, move any number of your units to an open battlefield.
flavorText: (Mysterious flower noises intensify.)

name: Bard - Mercurial (Signature)
description:
You may exhaust your legend as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, move any number of your units to an open battlefield.
flavorText: (Mysterious flower noises intensify.)

name: Mech // Buff
description: A unit may have no more than one buff at a time.
flavorText: Sure, they're loud, messy, and unreliable. But so are people, when you get down to it.

name: Sand Soldier // Buff
description: A unit may have no more than one buff at a time.
flavorText: They do not rest. They do not hesitate. And they do not yield.

name: Gold // Buff
description:
Gold Token:
Kill this, Exhaust: [REACTION] — Add 1 Rune. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

Buff Token: A unit may have no more than one buff at a time.
